human_verification.notes: Reviewed hospital finance operations boundary, billing/posting/reconciliation/denial evidence expectations, CMS/HHS/eCFR/CAQH source authority mapping, PHI handling, clinical/coding/payer/accounting/legal approval boundaries, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: All required healthcare-and-care-delivery research scenario families are mapped to explicit scenario IDs.
All shared, revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation, and healthcare-and-care-delivery abilities are validated and covered.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains for this validated specification-based package.
No unreviewed regressions are present in this package build.

specialist_owned_evidence: Authority boundaries are explicit for source-supported billing, posting, reconciliation, denial, adjustment, patient billing, PHI handling, clinical judgment, medical coding, payer interpretation, accounting, tax, legal, and financial approval decisions.
Research sources cover public healthcare regulator guidance, public payer/provider operating guidance, and recognized healthcare workflow or measure guidance.

Scenario map covers normal billing readiness, remittance mismatch, unsupported charge support, missing prerequisites, unsupported financial override, PHI handling, clinical escalation, payer-policy routing, denial exception package, posting documentation gaps, conflicting policy, tenant terminology, patient billing protections, and system access blockers.
Commercialization and deployment artifacts define specification-based operation and separate retained-implementation promotion criteria.
notes: The pack is safe for specification-based runtime and does not claim trusted built authority.
Promotion to retained implementation is deferred to a separate explicit build, evidence, and approval event.
